hypothesis: Validate that PR #414 can bootstrap, fetch data, and enter the train loop on a single H100 before spending 8x H100 SXM.
promotion_gate: Smoke must complete cleanly before launching the 8x H100 SXM reproduction spec.

phases.description: Prepare the repo, virtualenv, zstandard, and flash_attn_interface on the pod.
phases.failure_summary: Fix the environment/bootstrap failure on the smoke pod before retrying.

phases.description: Download one training shard and run the two-minute PR #414 smoke configuration.
phases.failure_summary: Keep the smoke run on 1x H100 until it completes cleanly. Do not promote to 8x while operational failures remain.

success_summary: Smoke completed. Review the log, runtime signals, and environment tax before spending 8x H100 SXM compute.
manual_next_command: If the smoke log is clean, manually launch the full repro: python3 scripts/run_watchdog.py run run_specs/repro_pr414_full.json
